settings.title: Product details
settings.content: Material, pendant size, chain length, and care instructions go here.

settings.title: How your star map is made
settings.content: 1. Tell us the date, time, and place of your moment — tap “Find my coordinates” to drop a pin on the exact spot. 2. We chart the real night sky above it: every star position is calculated for your moment, nothing is decorative. 3. We laser-engrave the map with your caption and date, send you a photo proof, and ship once you approve.

settings.atc_label: Add to cart — free star map engraving
